description: Agentic workflow to plot BigEarthNet and xView1 images on a map for Germany from the 2nd half of 2017.
label: Satellite Imagery Plotting Workflow

participants.description: Agent to query dataset images for BigEarthNet and xView1 in Germany for the specified timeframe.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: data_query_agent
config.description: This agent queries the dataset for images.
config.system_message: You will find images from BigEarthNet and xView1 datasets in Germany from the 2nd half of 2017.

participants.description: Agent to filter images based on the specified category and time.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: image_filter_agent
config.description: This agent filters and counts images based on the specified criteria.
config.system_message: You will filter the fetched images by category and ensure they fulfill the requirements.

participants.description: Agent to plot the filtered images on the map for the specified location.
participants.label: MapAgent

config.name: map_plotting_agent
config.description: This agent is responsible for plotting images on the map.
config.system_message: You will plot the filtered images on the map for Germany.
